name: Emera Inc.
description: Emera Inc. is a geographically diverse energy and utilities company headquartered in Halifax, Nova Scotia. The company invests in electricity generation, transmission, and distribution, as well as gas transmission and distribution, serving customers in Canada, the United States, and the Caribbean. Emera is committed to providing safe, reliable, and clean energy, with a strategic focus on transitioning to lower-carbon energy sources and expanding its renewable energy portfolio.
